_comment: Editorial scorecards for four delivery-pillar indicators whose underlying data is political commitments rather than machine-readable series. Each value is an editorial interpretation of published announcements (gov.uk press releases, select-committee evidence, departmental annual reports) scored as percent-of-target-milestones-hit. The shipped values are refreshed whenever the underlying departmental announcements move, typically quarterly. The adapter enforces a 90-day freshness guard so a missed refresh surfaces in /admin/health. Every entry cites its primary source URL; the full provenance breakdown for each milestone lives in docs/DELIVERY_METHODOLOGY.md.

new_towns_milestones.source_label: New Towns Taskforce quarterly update, March 2026
new_towns_milestones.methodology: 3 of 7 designated sites at planning-consent stage, 2 at outline-design, 2 at pre-scoping. Weighted by published target dates.

bics_rollout.source_label: DESNZ BICS quarterly onboarding report, Q1 2026
bics_rollout.methodology: 8,140 firms onboarded against a 10,000-firm end-2026 target. Percent = actual / target.

industrial_strategy.source_label: DBT Industrial Strategy delivery dashboard, Q1 2026
industrial_strategy.methodology: Weighted mean of milestones tagged on-track (100), slipping (50), or missed (0) across the five published strategy pillars.

smr_programme.source_label: Great British Nuclear SMR down-select progress, March 2026
smr_programme.methodology: Shortlist of 3 vendors selected; site designation in progress. Weighted against published milestones for 2030 first-steel.

release_schedule: Refreshed quarterly or on major departmental announcement.
